description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, sci-fi inspired design with a tan and brown camouflage pattern covering its main body. The upper and lower receiver are robust, with a prominent circular mechanism and exposed mechanical components on the side, suggesting advanced technology or energy-based operation. The barrel is short and thick, ending in a black cylindrical muzzle device, while a pointed projectile or bayonet-like attachment is visible beneath. The grip is ergonomic and black, with a trigger guard integrated into the lower assembly. The top of the rifle has a raised section that may house a sighting system, and the overall build is accented with metallic and blue details, giving it a high-tech, tactical appearance. The rifle's form is compact yet substantial, with a curved lower guard and multiple interactive elements.
description: A compact, futuristic rifle with tan camouflage, exposed mechanical parts, and a robust, high-tech build featuring a short barrel and advanced detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, camouflage pattern, exposed circular mechanism, and the prominent black muzzle device.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rifle's width, the raised sighting area, and the alignment of the upper and lower body components.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the mirrored camouflage, mechanical details, and the blue and metallic accents near the grip.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the curved lower guard, the grip, and the underside of the barrel and muzzle device.
